name: Parmesan Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the bread machine according to the manufacturer's instructions.
2. Process in the regular bake cycle.
3. Remove from the baking pan and cool on a wire rack.
Yield: 1-1/2 lb loaf (tested in Hitachi, Panasonic, and Zojirushi machines; whether made by hand or in a bread machine, there was very little difference).
